metadata.title: Before You Build: The Map
metadata.playlist: Ship It — Build Your Brand's Live Presence
metadata.source: INFO 7375 Assignment 8 brief — Building Your Live Website, Resumes & LinkedIn Header

beats.narration_text: Hola — this is Liam. Assignment 8: build a live website, check its accessibility, design a LinkedIn header, generate three on-brand images, write two resumes — and do it all with AI. Six deliverables. Let me show you the map.

props.command: Walk me through Assignment 8 — all six deliverables.
output: Website → Accessibility → LinkedIn Header → 3 AI Images → ATS Resume → Visual Resume.
Every piece pulls from the same source: your A6/A7 brand sheet.

beats.narration_text: Here's the whole board. You have one brand — palette, fonts, logo, voice — built in Assignments 6 and 7. Assignment 8 is that brand applied six times. A website. An accessibility check. A LinkedIn header. Three AI-generated images. An ATS resume. A visual resume. Every deliverable pulls from the same source. So keep your brand sheet open for every episode. The only real mistake is letting any of these six drift from it.

shot.new_visual_element: Six deliverables as one asset system fed by the A6/A7 brand sheet

beats.narration_text: The mindset rule, said once: ship the first version, not the final version. A live site with four real sections beats a beautiful mockup that is not published. Functional over flawless. The AI gets you to functional fast — your judgment makes it yours.

shot.new_visual_element: Ship-it mindset: first version rule, functional over flawless

beats.narration_text: The map, recapped. One brand, six surfaces, drawn from Assignments 6 and 7. Ship the first version — live beats not-published. The AI does the heavy lift; you make the judgment call. No blank placeholders: your palette, your fonts, your logo in every surface — not a random gradient and a made-up name.

artifactLines: One brand, six surfaces: every deliverable pulls from your A6/A7 palette, fonts, and logo.
Ship the first version: live with four real sections beats a beautiful unpublished mockup.
AI does the heavy lift; you make the judgment call — steer it, don't just click Accept.
No blank placeholders: made-up names and random gradients are automatic deductions.

beats.narration_text: Your Turn — and this one is the only setup step that is not a graded deliverable. Open your Assignment 7 brand sheet. Find your exact hex codes: background, text, and accent. Write down your font names. Locate your logo file. Paste everything into one scratch document and call it My Brand Tokens. You will paste from that doc into every AI tool in every episode. Here is the prompt to build it with Claude.

props.command: I'm starting Assignment 8. My brand from A6/A7: [paste your brand sheet here]. Summarize my palette hex codes, font names, logo file name, and brand voice in a short 'Brand Tokens' reference card I can paste into every AI tool this week.
props.runningText: paste this into Claude to build your token doc…

beats.narration_text: Before You Build: The Map. Liam, in for Bear.
